_note: Color codes used throughout the project. Null values indicate colors not yet decided.
_note_usage: To access color codes from a GDScript: var file = FileAccess.open('res://data/color_codes.json', FileAccess.READ); var json = JSON.new(); json.parse(file.get_as_text()); var colors = json.data. Then access values like: Color(colors['miscellaneous']['App background']) or colors['category_colors']['Science'].
